zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnès de Dampierre於1130年出生在法國布格蒙特雷阿爾時，她的父親Guy Ier de Dampierre39歲，母親Helvide de Baudemont26歲。她於1152年與Nargeot de Toucy在法國布格蒙特雷阿爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1210年在她的家鄉享年80歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnès de Dampierre于1130年出生在法国布格蒙特雷阿爾时，她的父亲Guy Ier de Dampierre39岁，母亲Helvide de Baudemont26岁。她于1152年与Nargeot de Toucy在法国布格蒙特雷阿爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1210年在她的家乡享年80岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Agnès
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

en.lifeSummary: When Agnès de Dampierre was born in 1130, in Montréal, Yonne, Burgundy, France, her father, Guy Ier de Dampierre, was 39 and her mother, Helvide de Baudemont, was 26. She married Nargeot de Toucy in 1152, in Montréal, Yonne, Burgundy, France. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1210, in her hometown, at the age of 80.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnès de Dampierre est née en 1130, à Montréal, Yonne, Bourgogne, France, son père, Guy Ier de Dampierre, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Helvide de Baudemont, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Nargeot de Toucy en 1152, à Montréal, Yonne, Bourgogne, France. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1210, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 80 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agnès de Dampierre 1130 in Montréal, Yonne, Burgund, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Guy Ier de Dampierre 39 und ihre Mutter Helvide de Baudemont 26. Sie hat 1152 in Montréal, Yonne, Burgund, Frankreich Nargeot de Toucy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1210 im Alter von 80 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Agnès de Dampierre è nata il nel 1130 nel Montréal, Yonne, Bourgogne, Francia, sua padre, Guy Ier de Dampierre, aveva 39 anni e sua madre, Helvide de Baudemont, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato Nargeot de Toucy nel 1152, nel Montréal, Yonne, Bourgogne, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1210, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 80 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnès de Dampierreが1130年にフランスボウルゴグンイオンモントルeアルで生まれた時，父Guy Ier de Dampierreは39歳，母Helvide de Baudemontは26歳であった。1152年にフランスボウルゴグンイオンモントルeアルでNargeot de Toucyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1210年に故郷で80歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnès de Dampierre(이)가 1130년 프랑스 부르고그니 욘 몽e앨에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Guy Ier de Dampierre(은)는 39세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Helvide de Baudemont(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 1152년 프랑스 부르고그니 욘 몽e앨에서 Nargeot de Toucy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1210년 그녀의 고향에서 80세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Agnès de Dampierre nasceu em 1130, em Montréal, Yonne, Bourgogne, França, seu pai, Guy Ier de Dampierre, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Helvide de Baudemont, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com Nargeot de Toucy em 1152, em Montréal, Yonne, Bourgogne, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1210, em sua cidade natal, com 80 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnès de Dampierre родилась в 1130 г. в местности монтрeаль, енн, бургогн, Франция, её отцу по имени Guy Ier de Dampierre было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Helvide de Baudemont, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Nargeot de Toucy в 1152 г. в местности монтрeаль, енн, бургогн, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1210 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 80 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Agnès de Dampierre nació en 1130, en Montréal, Yonne, Bourgogne, Francia, su papá, Guy Ier de Dampierre, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Helvide de Baudemont, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Nargeot de Toucy en 1152, en Montréal, Yonne, Bourgogne, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1210, en su pueblo, a la edad de 80 años.
